mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.title, p.content, u.nickname AS authorName, p.view_cnt AS viewCnt, p.like_cnt AS likeCnt, p.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.post_id) AS commentCnt FROM post p JOIN users u ON p.user_num = u.user_num WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
